covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
covid_surveillance.long_description: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
influenza_surveillance.long_description: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly rsv surveillance data from North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
rsv_surveillance.long_description: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services collects and reports rsv surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ili_surveillance.short_description: Weekly ili surveillance data from North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
ili_surveillance.long_description: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services collects and reports ili surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

nc_dph.name: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
nc_dph.organization: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
nc_dph.description: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for North Carolina covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
nc_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
